_comment_provider: Set 'provider' to: openai | gemini | bedrock. If primary fails → auto-fallback to open-source embeddings.
_comment_store: Vector DB: chroma (local dev) | opensearch (AWS production)

llm._comment_openai: OpenAI models — used when provider = openai
llm._comment_gemini: Gemini models — used when provider = gemini
llm._comment_bedrock: AWS Bedrock models — used when provider = bedrock
llm._comment_active: These are the ACTIVE values — must match provider above
llm._comment_fallback: Auto-used if primary provider embedding call fails

vector_store._comment: type: chroma = local dev (zero infra) | opensearch = AWS production

indices._comment: schemes_index = official scheme PDFs (eligibility, benefits, process)
indices._comment2: citizen_faq_index = FAQs, helpdesk guides, citizen-language documents
